attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 TRIM(CAST(SNGL_QTE.OBJECT_ID AS BIGINT)) AS BK_QUOTE_NUM,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.CBN_DISTI_ID,-999) AS RU_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.QUOTE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS QUOTE_NAME,
 COALESCE(NCWP.CEC_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS LDAP_USER_ID ,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.QUOTE_STATUS_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS DEAL_QUOTE_STATUS_CD,
 COALESCE(D_EXTN.APPROVAL_ROUTE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS APPROVAL_ROUTE_CD,
 NULL AS GROSS_MARGIN_PCT,
 SNGL_QTE.QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DATE AS DEAL_QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DT,
 /*COALESCE(Q_LINE.LIST_PRICE,0) AS SRC_RPRTD_TTL_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT,*/
 CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.LIST_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0) as decimal(26,7)) as SRC_RPRTD_TTL_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT,
 /*COALESCE(Q_LINE.NET_PRICE,0) AS SRC_RPRTD_TTL_NET_PRC_USD_AMT,*/
 CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.NET_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0) as decimal(26,7)) as SRC_RPRTD_TTL_NET_PRC_USD_AMT,
 0 AS SRC_RPRTD_EFCTV_PRDT_DSCNT_PCT,
 0 AS SRC_RPRTD_EFCTV_SVC_DSCNT_PCT,
 SNGL_QTE.UPDATED_ON AS SOURCE_UPDATED_DTM,
 SNGL_QTE.CREATED_ON AS SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,
 SNGL_QTE.UPDATED_BY AS SOURCE_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
 SNGL_QTE.CREATED_BY AS SOURCE_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
 COALESCE(PRICE_LST.ERP_PRICE_LIST_NAME,'UNK') AS PRICE_LIST_NAME,
 COALESCE(DEAL.BK_DEAL_ID, 'UNKNOWN') AS BK_DEAL_ID,
 SNGL_QTE.LAST_PRICED_DATE AS LAST_PRICE_DTM,
 COALESCE(PRICE_LST.CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK') AS FROM_CURRENCY_CD,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.FEDERAL_FLG,'N') AS FEDERAL_FLG,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.TAA_FLG,'N') AS TRADE_ACT_FLG,
 -- CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CONVERSION_DT, -- Commented as part of MDM
 COALESCE(SNGL_SCNE.CURRENCY_EXCHANGE_DATE,QUOTE.CONVERSION_DT,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CONVERSION_DT,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.IS_ERATE_DEAL,'N') AS ERATE_FLG,
 SNGL_QTE.OBJECT_ID AS SK_QUOTE_OBJECT_ID_INT,
 CASE WHEN COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.ACTIVE,0)=1 THEN 'Y' ELSE'N'END AS ACTIVE_FLG,
 'USD' AS TO_CURRENCY_CD,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.FRAME_AGREEEMENT,'N') AS FRAME_AGREEMENT_FLG,
 COALESCE(LOC_KEY.BILL_LOC_KEY,-999) AS PARTNER_BILL_TO_LOCATOR_KEY,
 COALESCE(EL_INT.LOV_VALUE,'UNKNOWN') AS INTENDED_USE_CD,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.BOM_SOURCE,'UNKNOWN') AS BOM_SOURCE_CD,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.FULFILLMENT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS FULFILLMENT_TYPE_CD,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.TRADEIN_STATE,'N') AS TRADE_IN_FLG,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.CONTRACTUAL_DISC,'N') AS CONTRACTUAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.IS_Q2O_ELIGIBLE,'N') AS IS_QUOTE_TO_ORGER_ELIGiBLE_FLG,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.IS_DISTI_Q2O_ELIGIBLE,'N') AS DISTRIBUTOR_ORDERABLE_FLG,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.AUTO_NEGOTIATE_NS,'N') AS AUTO_NEGOTIATE_FLG,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.IS_STRINGENT,'N') AS IS_STRINGENT_FLG,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.IS_FINALIZED,'N') AS IS_FINALIZED_FLG,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.IS_FA_FLAG,'N') AS REUSABLE_NON_STNDRD_DSCNT_ROLE,
 COALESCE(CAST(SNGL_QTE.CBN_STATUS AS CHAR(1) ),'N') AS CISCO_BOOKINGS_NEUTRALITY_ROLE,
 TRIM(SNGL_QTE.FA_DEAL_ID) AS RU_PARENT_QUOTE_NUM,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.CBN_SPLIT_ELIGIBLE,'N') AS RU_CBN_SPLIT_ELIGIBILITY_FLG,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.FA_DEAL_ID,DEAL.BK_DEAL_ID) AS DV_RNSD_PARENT_ID,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
 USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
 USER,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.CRP_FLG,'N') AS CRP_FLG,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.GDR_FLG,'N') AS GDR_FLG,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.STD_INCR_FLAG,'N') AS INCREMENTAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,
 COALESCE(EL_CBN.LOV_VALUE,'UNKNOWN') AS CBN_STATUS_CD,
 COALESCE(SNGL_QTE.LEAD_PARTNER_TYPE,-999) AS LEAD_PTNR_TYPE_CD_INT,
 COALESCE(CAST(SNGL_QTE.LEAD_PARTNERS  AS INTEGER),-999) AS LEAD_PTNR_BE_GEO_ID_INT,
 'CCW' AS SS_CODE,
 'UNKNOWN' AS BUY_METHOD_CHANNEL_CD,
CASE WHEN
 UPPER(SNGL_QTE.IS_PCM) = 'TRUE' THEN 'Y'
 ELSE 'N' 
		END AS IS_PUBLIC_CLD_MARKETPLACE_FLG,
 'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
 '=' AS DML_TYPE
 FROM  
 (
 SELECT 
 OBJECT_ID                     ,
 DEAL_OBJECT_ID                ,
 CREATED_BY                    ,
 CREATED_ON                    ,
 UPDATED_BY                    ,
 UPDATED_ON                    ,
 ACTIVE                        ,
 FRAME_AGREEEMENT              ,
 PRICE_LIST_ID                 ,
 LAST_PRICED_DATE              ,
 BOM_SOURCE                    ,
 CONTRACTUAL_DISC              ,
 QUOTE_ID                      ,
 QUOTE_NAME                    ,
 TRADEIN_STATE                 ,
 CBN_STATUS                    ,
 CBN_DISTI_ID                  ,
 IS_Q2O_ELIGIBLE               ,
 AUTO_NEGOTIATE_NS             ,
 CBN_SPLIT_ELIGIBLE            ,
 IS_DISTI_Q2O_ELIGIBLE         ,
 FULFILLMENT_TYPE              ,
 INTENDED_USE                  ,
 QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DATE         ,
 IS_STRINGENT                  ,
 IS_FINALIZED                  ,
 IS_FA_FLAG                    ,
 FA_DEAL_ID                    ,
 FEDERAL_FLG                   ,
 TAA_FLG                       ,
 IS_ERATE_DEAL                 ,
 QUOTE_STATUS_NAME             ,
 GDR_FLAG GDR_FLG                       ,
 STD_INCR_FLAG                 ,
 CRP_FLAG CRP_FLG            ,
 LEAD_PARTNER_TYPE    ,
 LEAD_PARTNERS   ,
IS_PCM 
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_INT_CQ_SINGLE_QUOTE_VW 
 )SNGL_QTE
 INNER JOIN 
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL DEAL 
 ON SNGL_QTE.DEAL_OBJECT_ID = DEAL.SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_RAW_CQ_NS_DEAL_EXTN_VW D_EXTN
 ON DEAL.SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT = D_EXTN.DEAL_OBJECT_ID
 LEFT JOIN 
 (SELECT * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_CQ_SNGL_SCENARIO_VW QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY REFERENCE_OBJECT_ID, DEAL_OBJECT_ID ORDER BY CURRENCY_EXCHANGE_DATE DESC)=1 ) SNGL_SCNE
 ON SNGL_QTE.OBJECT_ID = SNGL_SCNE.REFERENCE_OBJECT_ID
 AND SNGL_QTE.DEAL_OBJECT_ID = SNGL_SCNE.DEAL_OBJECT_ID 
 AND  SNGL_SCNE.PUBLISHED_DATE IS NOT NULL
 LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.ST_INT_RAW_PRICE_LIST PRICE_LST
 ON PRICE_LST.PRICE_LIST_ID =  SNGL_QTE.PRICE_LIST_ID
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT QUOTE_OBJECT_ID QUOTE_OBJECT_ID, SUM(EXT_LIST_PRICE) LIST_PRICE,SUM(FINAL_NET_PRICE) NET_PRICE 
             FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LINE_VW GROUP BY QUOTE_OBJECT_ID) Q_LINE
 ON SNGL_QTE.OBJECT_ID = Q_LINE.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID
 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT QUOTE_OBJECT_ID QUO_OBJ_ID, BILLTO_LOCATION BILLTO_LOC, ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY BILL_LOC_KEY
            FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_DMR_DEAL_BILL_TO BILLTO
            INNER JOIN (SELECT SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT,ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE 
      FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE
            QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY  SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT ORDER BY  CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY DESC,
      EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME DESC)=1) BILLKEY  ON BILLKEY.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = cast(BILLTO.BILLTO_LOCATION as BIGINT)
      AND BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE = 'BILL_TO'
            QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY QUO_OBJ_ID ORDER BY EDW_UPDATED_DATE  DESC)=1 ) LOC_KEY 
 ON LOC_KEY.QUO_OBJ_ID = SNGL_QTE.OBJECT_ID
 -- Newly added to populate currency conversion date
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE QUOTE
 ON SNGL_QTE.QUOTE_ID = QUOTE.BK_QUOTE_NUM
 LEFT JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NDAILY
  ON NDAILY.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = PRICE_LST.CURRENCY_CODE AND 
  NDAILY.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD' AND
  NDAILY.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= CONVERSION_DT 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY  NCWP
 ON NCWP.CEC_ID = SNGL_QTE.CREATED_BY
 AND NCWP.RU_EMPLOYEE_STATUS_CODE ='A'
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CQ_LOV EL_INT  
 ON SNGL_QTE.INTENDED_USE=EL_INT.LOV_INDEX 
 AND EL_INT.LOV_TYPE='INTENDED_USE'
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CQ_LOV EL_CBN  
 ON SNGL_QTE.CBN_STATUS=EL_CBN.LOV_INDEX 
 AND EL_CBN.LOV_TYPE='CBN_STATUS'
 WHERE SNGL_QTE.OBJECT_ID IS NOT NULL
 AND DEAL.SS_CODE <> 'CCWR'

SELECT
 TRIM(ST.QUOTE_ID)  as BK_QUOTE_NUM,
 -999 AS RU_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
 COALESCE(ST.QUOTE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS QUOTE_NAME,
COALESCE(TRIM(NCWP.CEC_ID),'UNKNOWN') AS LDAP_USER_ID,---newly updated
 CASE WHEN ST.QUOTE_STATUS_DESC = 'APPROVAL_IN_PROGRESS' THEN 'Approval In Progress'
 ELSE
 COALESCE(ST.QUOTE_STATUS_DESC,'UNKNOWN') END AS DEAL_QUOTE_STATUS_CD, /*newly updated*/
 'UNKNOWN' AS APPROVAL_ROUTE_CD,
 NULL AS GROSS_MARGIN_PCT,
 ST.QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DATE AS DEAL_QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DT,
 COALESCE(Q_LINE.LIST_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(CURR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1.00000000) AS SRC_RPRTD_TTL_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT,---newly updated
 COALESCE(Q_LINE.NET_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(CURR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1.00000000) AS SRC_RPRTD_TTL_NET_PRC_USD_AMT,  ---newly updated
 0 AS SRC_RPRTD_EFCTV_PRDT_DSCNT_PCT,
 0 AS SRC_RPRTD_EFCTV_SVC_DSCNT_PCT,
 ST.UPDATED_ON AS SOURCE_UPDATED_DTM,
 ST.CREATED_ON AS SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,
 ST.UPDATED_BY AS SOURCE_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
 ST.CREATED_BY AS SOURCE_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
 COALESCE(ST.PRICE_LIST_NAME,'UNK') AS PRICE_LIST_NAME,
 COALESCE(TRIM(ST.DEAL_ID), 'UNKNOWN') AS BK_DEAL_ID,
 NULL AS LAST_PRICE_DTM,
 COALESCE(ST.CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK') AS FROM_CURRENCY_CD,
 COALESCE(OREPLACE(TRIM(ST.FEDERAL_FLAG),'',NULL),'N') as FEDERAL_FLG, /*changed code*/
 'N' AS TRADE_ACT_FLG,
 CURRENT_DATE AS CONVERSION_DT,----need to check existing ccw el flow n modify accordingly
 'N' AS ERATE_FLG,
 TRIM(CAST(ST.QUOTE_ID  as DECIMAL(18,0)))as SK_QUOTE_OBJECT_ID_INT,
 CASE WHEN ST.IS_PRIMARY='TRUE' THEN 'Y'
  WHEN ST.IS_PRIMARY IS NULL THEN 'N'
  WHEN ST.IS_PRIMARY='FALSE' THEN 'N'
 ELSE 
 'N' END  AS ACTIVE_FLG,
 'USD' AS TO_CURRENCY_CD,
 'N' AS FRAME_AGREEMENT_FLG,
 COALESCE(BILLKEY.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,-999) AS PARTNER_BILL_TO_LOCATOR_KEY,--newly updated
 COALESCE(ST.INTENDED_USE_DESC,'UNKNOWN') AS INTENDED_USE_CD,---NEWLY UPDATED
 'UNKNOWN' AS BOM_SOURCE_CD,
  COALESCE(ST.FULFILLEMENT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS FULFILLMENT_TYPE_CD,--newly updated
 'N' AS TRADE_IN_FLG,
 'N' AS CONTRACTUAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,
 'N' AS IS_QUOTE_TO_ORGER_ELIGiBLE_FLG,
 'N' AS DISTRIBUTOR_ORDERABLE_FLG,
 'N' AS AUTO_NEGOTIATE_FLG,
 'N' AS IS_STRINGENT_FLG,
 --'N' AS IS_FINALIZED_FLG,/*need to map from source either it will be finalized flag or primary flag*/
 CASE WHEN ST.IS_PRIMARY='TRUE' THEN 'Y'
  WHEN ST.IS_PRIMARY IS NULL THEN 'N'
  WHEN ST.IS_PRIMARY='FALSE' THEN 'N'
 ELSE 
 'N' END AS IS_FINALIZED_FLG,
 'N' AS REUSABLE_NON_STNDRD_DSCNT_ROLE,
 'N' AS CISCO_BOOKINGS_NEUTRALITY_ROLE,
 NULL AS RU_PARENT_QUOTE_NUM,
 'N' AS RU_CBN_SPLIT_ELIGIBILITY_FLG,
 CASE WHEN TRIM(ST.DEAL_ID)='' THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
     WHEN ST.DEAL_ID IS NULL  THEN 'UNKNOWN'
	 ELSE
	 ST.DEAL_ID END AS DV_RNSD_PARENT_ID,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 'N' AS CRP_FLG,
 'N' AS GDR_FLG,
 'N' AS INCREMENTAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,
 'UNKNOWN' AS CBN_STATUS_CD,
 -999 AS LEAD_PTNR_TYPE_CD_INT,---need to join with partner table with be_id and get partner type---CHECK DATA FOR THIS COLUMN
 TRIM(CAST(ST.PARTNER_BE_GEO_ID AS BIGINT)) AS LEAD_PTNR_BE_GEO_ID_INT,
 'REVCLOUD' AS SS_CODE,
 'UNKNOWN' AS BUY_METHOD_CHANNEL_CD,
 'N' AS IS_PUBLIC_CLD_MARKETPLACE_FLG,
  'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
 '=' AS DML_TYPE
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_REVCLOUD_QUOTE_HEADERS ST
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT QUOTE_ID AS QUOTE_ID, SUM(EXT_LIST_PRICE) AS LIST_PRICE,SUM(FINAL_NET_PRICE) AS NET_PRICE 
             FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_REVCLOUD_QUOTE_LINES GROUP BY quote_id) Q_LINE
 ON TRIM(ST.QUOTE_ID) = TRIM(Q_LINE.QUOTE_ID)
 ----
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY  NCWP
ON NCWP.CEC_ID = ST.CREATED_BY
AND NCWP.RU_EMPLOYEE_STATUS_CODE ='A'
------------------------
LEFT JOIN /* NEWLY ADDED JOIN*/
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE CURR
ON
CURR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE=ST.CURRENCY_CODE 
AND 
CURR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=CURRENT_DATE/*NEED CONFIRMATION REGARDING THIS CONDITION*/
AND
CURR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE='USD' AND /* newly added condition, need to conform with nagendra*/
CURR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE='Corporate'
 ----
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT,ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY  SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT ORDER BY  CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY DESC,EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME DESC)=1) BILLKEY
           ON TRIM(BILLKEY.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT) = TRIM(ST.BILL_TO_SITE_ID) AND BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE = 'BILL_TO'
		   
		   /*
		   MAP PARTNER_TYPE_CD AS LEAD_PTNR_TYPE_CD_INT (??)---NEED TO CHECK WITH SOURCE TEAM
from COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY
ON BK_PARTY_ID_INT = CR_ID
AND BK_BE_GEO_ID_INT/DD_PGTMV_BE_GEO_ID_INT = PARTNER_BE_GEO_ID
AND PARTNER_ID_INT/BK_PGTMV_PARTNER_ID_INT = BE_ID 
		   */

SELECT	

/*--Adding additional columns as per new EX table (Added as part of CCW Data Fix Aug Rel */

SINGLE_QUOTE.OBJECT_ID                     ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.DEAL_OBJECT_ID                ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.ERP_PRICE_LIST_ID             ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.CREATED_BY                    ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.CREATED_ON                    ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.UPDATED_BY                    ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.UPDATED_ON                    ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.ACTIVE                        ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.NET_PRICE_DEAL                ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.FRAME_AGREEEMENT              ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.SOURCE_TYPE                   ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.PROD_PRICING_COMMENT          ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.SERV_PRICING_COMMENT          ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.PRICE_LIST_ID                 ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.INACTIVE_OBJECT_ID            ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.BOM_STATE                     ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.LAST_PRICED_DATE              ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.CART_ID                       ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.SITE_OBJECT_ID                ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.BOM_SOURCE                    ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.CONTRACTUAL_DISC              ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.QUOTE_IMPORT_DATE             ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.QUOTE_ID                      ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.QUOTE_NAME                    ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.TRADEIN_STATE                 ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.CBN_STATUS                    ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.CBN_DISTI_ID                  ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.IS_Q2O_ELIGIBLE               ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.DISCOUNT_SUMMARY              ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.AUTO_NEGOTIATE_NS             ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.CBN_SPLIT_ELIGIBLE            ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.IS_DISTI_Q2O_ELIGIBLE         ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.TAB_FLAG                      ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.TAB_SUBTRACK                  ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.TAB_PERIOD                    ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.PRICE_BOOK_ID                 ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.CURRENCY_CODE                 ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.BILLING_TERM                  ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.FULFILLMENT_TYPE              ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.FULFILLMENT_SOURCE_ID         ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.IRONPORT_FLAG                 ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.PRICED_FOR_AUTH               ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.COPY_FROM_QUOTE               ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.QUOTE_STATUS                  ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.INTENDED_USE                  ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.QUOTE_CATEGORY                ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DATE         ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.IS_STRINGENT                  ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.IS_FINALIZED                  ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.CUSTOMER_CATALOG_FLAG         ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.IS_FA_FLAG                    ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.FA_DEAL_ID                    ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.FEDERAL_FLG                   ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.TAA_FLG                       ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.IS_ERATE_DEAL                 ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.RN                            ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.QUOTE_STATUS_NAME             ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.INCREMENTAL_DISCOUNT_FLG      ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.GDR_FLAG                      ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.STD_INCR_FLAG                 ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.CRP_FLAG                      ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.LEAD_PARTNER_TYPE             ,
SINGLE_QUOTE.LEAD_PARTNERS   ,              
SINGLE_QUOTE.IS_PCM
FROM	
$$STGDB.ST_INT_CQ_SINGLE_QUOTE_VW SINGLE_QUOTE
WHERE	NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT	1 
FROM	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL DEAL
WHERE	SINGLE_QUOTE.DEAL_OBJECT_ID = DEAL.SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT
AND DEAL.SS_CODE <> 'CCWR')
